title: Fix deployment errors and complete build

requirements.text: Resolve any compilation errors in backend/main.mo that are preventing successful deployment
Resolve any build errors in the frontend that are preventing successful deployment
acceptanceCriteria: No missing dependencies or import errors

requirements.text: Ensure all actor interface declarations match the implementation in backend/main.mo
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend actor declarations match backend public methods
All method signatures are consistent between frontend and backend

requirements.text: Verify all imported modules and dependencies are correctly configured
acceptanceCriteria: All npm packages are installed and compatible

constraints: Do not modify the single-actor architecture in backend/main.mo
Preserve all existing functionality including user profiles, booking requests, and admin access control
Do not change immutable frontend paths (hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, hooks/useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui)
Maintain existing branding (Avsarvatika), contact info (+91 9794416439), and pricing (₹35,000/₹50,000/₹70,000)
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or styling
Modifying the database schema or state structure
Refactoring code that is working correctly
